macro.title: Walmart Lays Off or Relocates About 1,000 Corporate Workers - WSJ
macro.summary: Retailer cuts jobs as it combines more of its global-tech and product teams

macro.title: Altman Testifies About ‘Hair-Raising’ AI Safety Chat With Musk - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: OpenAI’s Sam Altman testified that he was “extremely uncomfortable” with Elon Musk’s insistence that he have complete control over a proposed for-profit subsidiary of the startup back in 2017.

macro.title: Howard Schultz, who sold 'public trust,' torches Seattle, Washington state on his way out - KOMO
macro.summary: Former Starbucks CEO and Chairman Howard Schultz is moving to Florida and torching state and local leaders as he packs up his moving van.

macro.title: This Is the Real Swatch x Audemars Piguet Royal Pop Collaboration - WIRED
macro.summary: With Instagram awash with inaccurate AI-generated concepts for its Royal Pop collab, Swatch was forced to reveal the genuine article.
